name: Apex — Ollama Tri-Model (DeepSeek-R1 + Qwen3 + Kimi K2)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'deepseek-r1:latest', prompt: $('Prepare Prompt').item.json.system + '\n\n' + $('Prepare Prompt').item.json.prompt, stream: false, options: { temperature: 0.6, num_predict: 2048, top_p: 0.95 } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'qwen3:latest', prompt: $('Prepare Prompt').item.json.system + '\n\n' + $('Prepare Prompt').item.json.prompt, stream: false, options: { temperature: 0.7, num_predict: 2048, top_p: 0.9 } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'kimi-k2:latest', prompt: '<think>
' + $('Prepare Prompt').item.json.system + '

' + $('Prepare Prompt').item.json.prompt + '
</think>', stream: false, options: { temperature: 0.5, num_predict: 4096, top_p: 0.85 } }) }}
